title: Unify Navigation Across All 11 Pages
description: Unified nav CSS across all 11 pages. Sticky 56px desktop nav, hamburger mobile dropdown at 768px, .view-tabs secondary bar for MC sub-views. ARIA labels (aria-label='Site navigation') on all nav elements. 3 different nav patterns consolidated to 1.

florentino_gate.reason: UX overhaul is critical path for product quality. Approved per TKT-159 audit findings.

2026-02-28T12:00:00Z.detail: Implemented as part of StatsLedge UX Overhaul (TKT-267 through TKT-280). All 20 QA checks pass.
